# Transcrição: 12. Lead may be on the Wrong Product

- **Fonte:** 12. Lead may be on the Wrong Product
- **Duração:** 02:21
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:21]

A big mistake can be this. You assume the lead knows what they want and that they're on the right product. Okay, the truth is this. Over almost 68% to 70% of everyone that hits your site is on a product they will not purchase. That is validated by a fact that says 79% of all leads never, ever convert into that product sale. Why? They were on their own product. They're shopping a product they're not going to buy. Maybe I'm shopping flooring. I'm looking at flooring. Oh my gosh, I love that flooring. And I don't buy that flooring. I end up not doing the flooring project at all because I decided to redo my kitchens instead of doing the floors. Now, what's the point of that? The point is I'm still a buyer. I still have money. There's still something you could have helped me with, but it wasn't the floors. And you're sitting there for the next three months selling them floor data, floor information, tiles, choices, colors, images, and didn't find out one thing. They're on the wrong unit. They're on the wrong product. They had the wrong interest at the wrong time. And it doesn't matter what business you're in. You could be a dentist, chiropractor. You could be an engineer, an accounting firm, a legal firm. Your client is on a product they will not buy almost, well, over two thirds of the time. So watch for that. Look for it. Watch for it. Are you looking at any other products? Are you considering any other products at this time? For instance, right now, I'm redoing a house. And I look at house.com all the time, houzz.com. There's products for everything there. Every home that has ever been done that looks good, lamps, bedding, pillows, floors, you name it, it's there. I can't tell you how many sites I've hit. I've hit probably 15 or 20 sites in the last two weeks. Give me this data. Everything from dining room tables to floors to faucets. Well, I might not buy that one product that I hit, but I'm still going to take care of that place. 68% of the time, the prospect that hit your site was on a product they will not buy the wrong product. So take the time to qualify, ask or offer choices and give people other choices and make sure in your responses that they know all the other things, the services and the products that you can help this customer with.
